title: “You will be dead forever”: Sneako posts disturbing messages after Australia reportedly issues lifetime ban against streamer
summary_full: Streamer Nico “Sneako” Kenn De Balinthazy shared another cryptic message on X saying, “I am ready to die,” after reports claimed Australia banned him from entering the country. Sneako denied being deported and later claimed federal agents followed him during his visit. His latest posts have gained major attention because of repeated death-themed messages shared over the past two weeks.
